author: Hardheaded
text:
plugin: commit policy on negotiation outcome

CommitPolicy rides along with NegotiationResult::Ok via a new
Accepted { outcome, commit_policy } shape; Protocol::commit_policy
defaults to Commit { message: None } so today's per-op behavior is
preserved. A new commit_policy module composes contributions for one
event: rejects Required+Suppress before any state lands, coalesces
Batch by tag, wraps custom messages with a "plugin: <name>: " safety
prefix. Legacy push dispatch routes through the planner; native
plugins (bl-8b71) opt into Suppress / Batch / custom messages.
